mapper.insert: insert into test_declaration_product (plan_id, product_type, product_index, product_id, product_name, attribute, create_user, create_time) values (#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productIndex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into test_declaration_product
plan_id,
product_type,
product_index,
product_id,
product_name,
attribute,
create_user,
create_time,
#{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{productType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productIndex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attribute,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: SELECT product_type_id value, product_type_name label FROM test_product_type WHERE del_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM test_declaration_product WHERE plan_id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
